title: cymbalariella hederifolia
intro: Cymbalariella hederifolia, also known as Cymbalaria hederifolia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as the plantain family. This plant, with its leaves resembling those of ivy, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Cymbalariella hederifolia include its potential to treat conditions such as gout, rheumatism, and urinary tract infections, while also being used to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Cymbalariella hederifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
